steps.title: Multiply both sides by y to isolate x
steps.content:
Starting with $b - 22 = \frac{x}{y}$, multiply both sides by $y$:
$$y(b - 22) = x$$

steps.title: Expand and identify the correct choice
steps.content:
Expanding $y(b - 22) = x$ by distributing $y$:
$$by - 22y = x$$
Therefore $x = by - 22y$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
